\\
Aug 21, 2025\\
\\
**Award-Winning Brilliance: IKONS Receives National Recognition for Design Excellence**\\
\\
We’re excited to announce that IKONS of the Mineral World: Nature's Finest Art has received two national publishing awards, highlighting its visual artistry and design quality.Produced by The Mineralogical Record and designed for collectors, connoisseurs, and art lovers, Ikons is a visually stunning celebration of nature’s finest art: minerals. This impressive book showcases some of the best mineral specimens ever photographed. It raises mineral collecting to the level of fine art with its careful layout, rich imagery, and thoughtful typography- and these awards show it has achieved that.\\
\\
\\
**Read More**](https://www.irocks.com/award-winning-brilliance-ikons-receives-national-recognition-for-design-excellence) [![](https://www.irocks.com/cms/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/gold25-3205c-wm-large-190x250.jpg)\\
